interpretation: The mounted 5.2.5 editor completed the configured 3,999-shape workload and 100-shape update below the default 4,000-shape page cap on this machine.
limitations: These timings are machine-specific evidence, not universal performance guarantees.
CI and release gates rerun the benchmark and upload the generated latest.json artifact.
The default maxShapesPerPage value is configurable and is not an unlimited-capacity claim.
